description_long: This is a round chocolate cake with a decorative exterior featuring vertical chocolate panels encircling the sides, held together by a thin red ribbon. The top of the cake is covered with a thick layer of white whipped cream icing, and is adorned with six glossy red cherries, several halved strawberries, and two large chocolate pieces, one of which is inscribed with 'Happy Birthday!'. The center of the cake's top surface has a dark chocolate disk, adding contrast to the white icing. The cake sits on a simple, round, light gray plate that provides a clean presentation. The overall appearance is festive and celebratory, suitable for a birthday or special occasion.
description: A round chocolate cake with white whipped cream icing, topped with cherries, strawberries, chocolate pieces, and a 'Happy Birthday!' plaque, presented on a gray plate.
description_view_0: Front view showing the chocolate panels, cherries, strawberries, and the 'Happy Birthday!' chocolate plaque prominently displayed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the arrangement of cherries and strawberries, with the chocolate plaque partially visible and the chocolate disk in the center.
description_view_2: Angled view focusing on the strawberries and chocolate pieces, with cherries encircling the top and the chocolate disk visible.
description_view_3: Rear view with the 'Happy Birthday!' plaque facing forward, surrounded by cherries and the chocolate disk in the center.
